hero.headline: Humanized Bot Engine for
hero.subline: Scale your customer interactions with our smart humanized bot engine. Automate CS 24/7, integrate with Google Services, and provide premium experience.

features.title: Smart Automation Features
features.description: Powerful tools to help you communicate more effectively with your customers.

list.title: Humanized AI Chat
list.description: NLP-driven responses that feel natural and personal to your customers.

list.title: 24/7 Auto-CS
list.description: Never miss a lead. Our bot handles common inquiries instantly at any time.

list.title: Google Workspace Sync
list.description: Automatically sync contacts, appointments and data to Sheets and Calendar.

integrations.title: Seamless Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your favorite tools and automate your entire workflow.

list.name: Google Sheets
list.description: Sync customer data and logs directly to spreadsheets.

list.name: Google Drive
list.description: Store and manage documents shared via WhatsApp.

list.name: Starter
